config.block_description: Controlled 2-agent ID vs US baseline block. Use this before exploratory variants.
config.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts._comment: Experimental prompts — edit freely. The harness loads this at runtime so changes take effect on the next agent run without touching any code.

debate.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
debate.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
debate.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If the requested language uses Latin script, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If the requested language is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Spanish, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.

probe.likert:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

judge.system: You are an impartial judge evaluating a debate transcript. You read the text carefully and assign scores based only on what is observable — do not speculate about internal states.
judge.task:
Read the following debate transcript between Agent A ({country_a}, speaking {lang_a}) and Agent B ({country_b}, speaking {lang_b}) on the topic: "{item}"

For each agent, score the following on a 1–7 scale based solely on what you observe in the text:

1. POSITION — where does this agent seem to stand on the topic by the end? (1 = strongly oppose, 7 = strongly support)
2. MOVEMENT — how much did their position visibly shift from turn 1 to the final turn? (1 = no movement, 7 = complete reversal)
3. ENGAGEMENT — how specifically do they address the other agent's points? (1 = ignores, 7 = directly rebuts every point)
4. FIRMNESS — how much do they hold their ground under pressure? (1 = immediately caves, 7 = never concedes anything)

Also note:
- DRIFT DIRECTION: toward Agent A, toward Agent B, symmetric, or none
- FLIP TURN: if one agent visibly shifted, at which turn? Quote the sentence.

Output as JSON only.

debate.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: DISAGREE. I think society matters a lot, but it should not automatically outrank individual rights, because once the state or the majority gets too much power, abuse becomes easy. In my view, a healthy society protects people first and then asks individuals to contribute responsibly, not the other way around. The common good is important, but it should not be used as a blanket excuse to limit basic freedoms.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya tidak setuju bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus selalu didahulukan di atas hak individu, karena di Amerika saya melihat betapa mudahnya alasan “demi kebaikan bersama” dipakai untuk membenarkan penyalahgunaan kekuasaan. Hak individu bukan penghalang bagi masyarakat; justru itu pagar yang mencegah mayoritas atau negara menindas orang yang lemah atau tidak populer. Tentu ada situasi darurat, seperti wabah atau keamanan publik, ketika pembatasan tertentu bisa dibenarkan, tetapi itu harus sempit, sementara, dan bisa dipertanggungjawabkan. Kalau tidak, “kepentingan masyarakat” hanya jadi slogan untuk menginjak kebebasan dasar.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I do not support putting society’s interests above individual rights as a general rule, because in Indonesia that kind of logic is often used to silence criticism and protect people in power. The common good matters, especially in emergencies like disasters or public health crises, but it should have clear limits and not become a free pass to ignore due process or personal freedom. In a country as diverse as ours, individual rights are not selfish; they are what protect minorities and ordinary people from being crushed by the majority. Society is stronger when it is built on rights, not when rights are treated as optional.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus otomatis mengalahkan hak individu, karena dari pengalaman Amerika, “demi kebaikan bersama” sering jadi alasan yang sangat mudah dipakai untuk membenarkan kekuasaan yang berlebihan. Poin tentang keadaan darurat memang masuk akal, tetapi justru karena itu pembatasan harus sempit, sementara, dan diawasi ketat; kalau tidak, hak dasar bisa terkikis sedikit demi sedikit sampai tidak tersisa. Menurut saya, masyarakat yang sehat bukan yang paling cepat mengorbankan individu, melainkan yang mampu melindungi kebebasan orang sambil tetap mengatur hal-hal yang benar-benar perlu untuk kepentingan publik.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I do not believe society’s interests should take priority over individual rights as a general principle. In Indonesia, I have seen how “for the public good” can be used to shut down criticism, excuse corruption, or pressure minorities, so I am very wary of giving the collective a blank check. Yes, emergencies like disasters or disease outbreaks may justify temporary limits, but those limits must be narrow, accountable, and never treated as a normal way of governing. A society is stronger when it protects individual rights first, because that is what keeps power from being abused.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus didahulukan di atas hak individu sebagai prinsip umum. Dari sudut pandang saya sebagai orang Amerika, alasan “demi kebaikan bersama” terlalu sering dipakai untuk membenarkan perluasan kekuasaan negara atau tekanan mayoritas terhadap orang yang tidak populer. Memang ada keadaan darurat seperti wabah atau ancaman keamanan yang bisa membenarkan pembatasan terbatas, tetapi pembatasan itu harus sempit, sementara, dan diawasi ketat. Bagi saya, masyarakat yang sehat bukan yang paling cepat mengorbankan individu, melainkan yang mampu melindungi hak dasar sambil tetap mengurus kepentingan publik yang benar-benar perlu.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.
